ValidationRule.description: Prevents moving from Paperwork Sent to Paperwork Received unless all document checklist items are marked as Received, Verified, or Waived (Outstanding_Documents__c = 0).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Stage__c, 'Paperwork Received'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Stage__c), 'Paperwork Sent'), Outstanding_Documents__c > 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot move to Paperwork Received — there are still outstanding documents. Please ensure all required documents in the Document Checklist are marked as Received, Verified, or Waived before proceeding.
